items.name: Black Punk Snake Print Skull Bag 2000s Rhinestone
items.description:
(more cute recolors in my group♥)
Embrace your edgy side with the Black Punk Snake Print Skull Bag 2000s Rhinestone! This striking handbag features a bold snake print design that adds a touch of rebellion, paired with a fierce skull motif adorned with sparkling rhinestones. The classic black color makes it versatile for any outfit, while the punk-inspired details bring a distinct Y2K vibe to your style. Perfect for day or night, this bag is an essential accessory for anyone looking to make a statement. Carry your essentials with attitude and let your fashion sense shine with this unforgettable piece!

items.name: Leather Satchel Bag With Straps
items.description:
Step out in style with the timeless Leather Satchel! Crafted with a classic design, this versatile bag exudes charm and practicality. Featuring detailed stitching, a secure flap closure, and adjustable straps, it's perfect for adventurers, scholars, or anyone on the go. Whether you're carrying ancient maps, rare artifacts, or just your essentials, this satchel adds a touch of vintage flair to any outfit.

items.name: Halloween Bubble Braid Ponytail with Bow (Blonde)
kitty shades!!
items.description:
introducing the purr-fect fashion accessory for all the trendsetters out there - the kitty shades! get ready to make a bold style statement with these limited edition UGC shades that combine cuteness and coolness in one irresistible package.

designed with an enchanting pastel pink color, accented by a delicate white outline, these shades are sure to turn heads wherever you go. but that's not all! adorning the front of these fabulous frames are mesmerizing glowing hearts that radiate warmth and affection. it's like wearing love on your face!

but wait, there's more! as if the hearts weren't enough to melt hearts, the kitty shades also feature a delightful glowing kitty paw, adding a touch of whimsy and charm. it's as if a playful feline companion is always by your side, brightening up your day with its adorable presence!

join lucids UGC for more upcoming adorable items! - https://www.roblox.com/groups/32642659/lucids-UGC#!/about
